event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1978-1982) merged duplicate event 9406b744-8242-5f7d-a23b-d56603968952 ("OSUOC Class B Meet at Cow Creek"). Reason: schedule duplicate. Notes: The OSUOC wording and later Cow Creek listing describe the same May 8-9, 1982 Corvallis-area meet.
